translation.hero_subtitle: Advanced message sandboxing, deep-link scanning, and real-time behavioral analysis. Protect your communications via zero-trust execution.
translation.bento_sandbox_desc: Isolate suspicious links and attachments in a headless environment.
translation.features_subtitle: Generic spam filters fail Nigerians. Fraudlock is trained on Nigerian SMS patterns, speaks Nigerian languages, and shares intelligence with telecommunications companies.
translation.feature_0_desc: Random Forest model trained on 4K+ Nigerian SMS samples — BVN scams, Ponzi alerts, JAMB fraud.
translation.feature_1_desc: Detects fraud in 4 Nigerian languages. Scammers switch dialects — our AI follows.
translation.feature_2_desc: AI reads results aloud in Nigerian-accented speech. Perfect for low-literacy users.
translation.feature_3_desc: Report scam numbers. At 20 reports, numbers are auto-flagged to MTN, Glo, & Airtel.
translation.feature_4_desc: Paste any SMS — get confidence %, risk level, and suspicious keyword highlights in < 200ms.
translation.feature_5_desc: Every prediction shows TF-IDF features, keyword boosts, and probability — fully explainable AI.
translation.how_0_desc: Any language — our system auto-detects Nigerian dialects and regional Pidgin variants.
translation.how_1_desc: 50K n-gram features extracted, weighted for Nigerian fraud vocabulary.
translation.how_2_desc: 187K-trained ensemble with predict_proba() — no black boxes.
translation.how_3_desc: Nigerian-specific layer: BVN, JAMB, GTB, OTP, 'double money' patterns.
translation.how_4_desc: Confidence %, risk level, suspicious words — read aloud by our AI.
translation.lang_subtitle: Switch language — every warning, confidence score, and audio alert adapts. Scammers switch languages too; our AI doesn't miss a beat.
translation.lang_0_sample: You have won ₦5,000,000! Send your BVN and ATM PIN to claim your prize now.
translation.lang_1_sample: Oga, your account don block! Send your BVN quick quick make we fix am for you.
translation.lang_2_sample: E ku ile o! Owo ₦2,000,000 ti de fun yin. Fi BVN yin ranse lati gba.
translation.lang_3_sample: Nwanne, ego ₦3,000,000 dị n'akpa gị. Zitere anyị BVN gị ugbu a.
translation.lang_4_sample: Ka samu ₦1,000,000! Aika BVN dinka yanzu don karbar kudin.
translation.community_body_1: Every scam number you report is stored, counted, and analyzed. When a number reaches <1>20 community reports</1>, it's automatically added to our telco recommendation list — and flagged for network-level blocking by MTN, Glo, and Airtel.
translation.community_body_2: Your report doesn't disappear into a void. You can track it in the admin dashboard, see how many others reported the same number, and get notified when it's flagged.
translation.cta_subtitle: Join Nigeria's AI fraud defense network. Free for citizens. API access for telcos and banks.
translation.footer_tagline: AI-Powered SMS Fraud Defense · Made for Nigeria · fraudlock.ng
translation.detect_subtitle: Paste any SMS to check if it's a phishing attempt. Powered by TF-IDF + Random Forest + SVM ensemble.
translation.report_subtitle: Report numbers that sent you fraud or phishing messages. Numbers with 20+ reports are auto-flagged and sent to telcos for blocking.
translation.report_message_placeholder: Paste the fraud message you received…
